task: Fix Intelligence placeholder layer click bug and clarify model visibility
root_cause: Legacy Intelligence rows for Opportunity Extrusions, Development Pressure, and Scenario Envelope were still present in the generic operational layer registry path. Two were still marked as mock graphics with visibility enabled, so the left rail could treat model placeholders as map actions even though the current product exposes development ranking research only through Methodology.

model_research_replacement.title: Model Research Status
model_research_replacement.copy: Development ranking research is available in Methodology. Parcel-level predictions are not public or production-ready.

methodology_visibility_clarification: Development Prediction Research Status remains in Methodology.
Current safety flags are displayed as model_active=false, prediction_probability_available=false, production_ready=false, public_exposure_allowed=false.
Only aggregate ranking class distribution is shown.
No parcel IDs, parcel-level ranking classes, or exact model probabilities are displayed.
